postData.contentHtml:
California Governor Gavin Newsom has launched a strong accusation against former President Donald Trump, alleging that Trump is directly behind a politically motivated Department of Justice (DOJ) investigation targeting Newsom and his wife. Newsom contends that this probe is an act of retaliation, possibly spurred by his potential presidential bid in 2028.

According to reports, federal agents have reportedly contacted several individuals closely associated with the Newsoms. Governor Newsom has characterized this federal scrutiny as a clear abuse of power and a politically targeted action aimed at undermining him.

The accusations have ignited significant discussion across various platforms. Social media sentiment reflects a mixed reaction, with a notable leaning towards positive support for Newsom's claims, while also acknowledging considerable debate surrounding the issue. This development adds another layer to the ongoing political tensions between the two prominent figures.
postData.title: Newsom Accuses Trump of Politically Motivated DOJ Probe
postData.summary: California Governor Gavin Newsom has publicly accused former President Donald Trump of orchestrating a politically motivated Department of Justice investigation against him and his wife.

sources.title: Newsom says new Trump DOJ probe is retaliation for potential 2028 run
Newsom says Trump is directing baseless DOJ investigation on him and wife
California Gov. Newsom accuses Trump of targeting him politically in probe
Gavin Newsom Says Trump Directed Investigation Of He And His Wife
Newsom Says Trump’s Justice Department Is Investigating Him and His Wife
